title: Task outcome: Read-only audit of Codex-only closed loop source/provenance graph changes focused on src/graph-h
summary: Completed read-only audit of source/provenance graph handling across graph-health, lifecycle, observatory, and verify-graph-health. The source resolver now recognizes evidence.source, source.trace_path, source.task_path, source_paths, source_operation_path, and legacy single source fields; live data inspection shows parseable accepted records are no longer source-less, with one remaining missing source path and a persisted graph-health score of 90. No repo files were edited.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Completed read-only audit of source/provenance graph handling across graph-health, lifecycle, observatory, and verify-graph-health. The source resolver now recognizes evidence.source, source.trace_path, source.task_path, source_paths, source_operation_path, and legacy single source fields; live data inspection shows parseable accepted records are no longer source-less, with one remaining missing source path and a persisted graph-health score of 90. No repo files were edited.
request: Read-only audit of Codex-only closed loop source/provenance graph changes focused on src/graph-health.ts, src/lifecycle.ts, scripts/dinobrain-observatory.mjs, scripts/verify-graph-health.mjs. Check evidence.source/source.trace_path/source_paths handling and acceptance gap. Do not edit files.
decisions: Kept the audit read-only; no source or data files were edited manually.
Treat the previous evidence.source/source_paths acceptance gap as mostly addressed by the current source resolver and verifier fixtures.
The remaining acceptance gap is source.trace_path-only coverage in scripts/verify-graph-health.mjs, plus parity coverage for lifecycle and observatory source resolution.
next_steps: Add a source.trace_path-only accepted fixture to scripts/verify-graph-health.mjs and assert it does not count as source-less or missing when the trace target exists.
Consider extracting shared source path normalization/resolution so graph-health, lifecycle, and observatory do not drift.
Repair or quarantine the one accepted record whose evidence.source is a descriptive label rather than a durable path, and review the three accepted JSON files flagged by PowerShell JSON parsing.
